11.reason: [The output format requires space-separated integers followed by a newline, but puts() outputs the string as-is without spaces between digits and adds a newline. Since Stack contains concatenated digit characters (e.g., '1','2'), puts() prints "12" instead of "1 2".]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The output format requires space-separated integers followed by a newline, but puts() outputs the string as-is without spaces between digits and adds a newline. Since Stack contains concatenated digit characters (e.g., '1','2'), puts() prints "12" instead of "1 2".]
